verifiedBy: azure-integration-engineer (Wave C 2026-06-29: #6 Box-folder-at-intake wiring + SWA UI deploy. intakeOrchestrator now calls boxFolderCreateOrchestrator after caseResolve (casePo-guarded, idempotent, best-effort); api 47->49 (added GET+POST /api/internal/cases/{id}/box-folder); orch stays 46 (wiring into existing funcs). SPA #2/#4/#12 fixes built with prod VITE_* and deployed to cespk-spa-dev production env. All via az config-zip / swa CLI since func is broken in this WSL env). Prior: Wave B api 44->47, orch 45->46.
notes: READ-ONLY ground-truth snapshot. No secrets/tokens stored. Re-verified in the 2026-06-29 doc-hygiene pass: functionCounts, gates, graphSubscriptions, mailboxRbac and httpsOnly all still match live. One change since the prior snapshot — PDF_MAPPER_ENABLED=true was found live on both apps and added to gates (it was unrecorded). postgresCounts remain unverified (PG firewall + no local psql). docDrift notes that referenced an OLDER CLAUDE.md are marked RESOLVED where the current docs already align.

functionCounts.sourceCommand: az functionapp function list -g rg-collisionspike-dev -n <app> --query '[].name' -o tsv | wc -l
functionCounts.docDrift: 2026-06-29 (AIE Wave C): api 47->49 — added internalCaseBoxFolderGet (GET /api/internal/cases/{id}/box-folder) + internalCaseBoxFolderStamp (POST, first-wins box_folder_id/url stamp + box_folder_created audit). orch stays 46 — #6 wired INTO intakeOrchestrator (callSubOrchestrator boxFolderCreateOrchestrator after caseResolve) + boxFolderCreate activity made idempotent; no new registrations. Prior Wave B: api 44->47, orch 45->46.

graphSubscriptions.sourceCommand: POST https://cespk-orch-dev.azurewebsites.net/api/graph-renew (graph-renew-http) -> runSubscriptionMaintenance PATCH /subscriptions; new expirationDateTime echoed in the JSON summary
graphSubscriptions.docDrift: 2026-06-29 (AIE Wave A): both subscriptions PATCH-renewed to 2026-07-06T10:19Z (was 2026-07-05T11:00). engineers@ + digital@ Inbox -> graph-webhook unchanged. Ongoing renewal is now driven by the durable subscriptionMonitorOrchestrator (see subscriptionRenewalRisk).

mailboxRbac.docDrift: RESOLVED: re-confirmed engineers@ + digital@ scoped (200), info@ + desk@ not scoped (403). The current docs already state this per-mailbox; the earlier blanket 'mailboxes not yet RBAC-scoped' claim has been corrected.

value.rootCause: Flex Consumption does not wake a scaled-to-zero app for a plain timer trigger, so graph-renew (NCRONTAB) logged 0 executions in 7d and subscriptions were heading for a silent lapse (azure-diagnostician root-caused, App Insights component cespk-orch-dev).
value.fix: Durable eternal-orchestration subscriptionMonitorOrchestrator (instanceId subscription-monitor-singleton, runtimeStatus Running): renew activity -> durable timer (SUBSCRIPTION_MONITOR_INTERVAL_HOURS, default 6h) -> continueAsNew. A durable timer message WAKES a scaled-to-zero Flex app (Microsoft Learn), so renewal fires unattended with NO always-ready instance and NO external scheduler. Bootstrapped by intake-starter (any intake traffic) and by the graph-renew HTTP route; the original graph-renew timer is retained as a backstop.

subscriptionRenewalRisk.sourceCommand: durable mgmt GET /runtime/webhooks/durabletask/instances/subscription-monitor-singleton (runtimeStatus Running, name subscriptionMonitorOrchestrator)
subscriptionRenewalRisk.note: OPERATOR WATCH (next cycle): confirm an UNATTENDED renew fires at the durable-timer wake (~6h after 2026-06-29T11:17Z) i.e. graph-renewal-success in App Insights with no manual trigger. Belt-and-braces fallback if it ever doesn't: az functionapp scale config always-ready set -g rg-collisionspike-dev -n cespk-orch-dev --settings function:graph-renew=1 (incurs an always-ready baseline cost — flagged, NOT enabled).

postgresCounts.sourceCommand: psql (Entra oss-rdbms token, user digital@collisionengineers.co.uk, options '-c app.role=staff') SELECT count(*) FROM work_provider
postgresCounts.reason: 2026-06-29 (AIE Wave A): work_provider=390 CONFIRMED via psql with app.role=staff (a transient PG firewall rule for the workstation IP was added then removed). KEY GOTCHA: work_provider has FORCE RLS — without app.role set, ALL rows read as 0 (the mcp__azure__postgres tool can't set app.role and is single-SELECT only, so it always sees 0). Other corpus counts not re-verified this pass. work_provider also gained a known_email_addresses column; OAK now carries oakwoodscotland.co.uk + oakwoodsolicitors.co.uk, YML carries address-level networkhduk@gmail.com.

httpsOnly.sourceCommand: az resource show -g rg-collisionspike-dev -n <app> --resource-type Microsoft.Web/sites --query properties.httpsOnly -o tsv
httpsOnly.note: az functionapp show --query httpsOnly returned null (property not surfaced by that path); az resource show confirmed true for both.

boxSmoke.docDrift: Box JWT auth is LIVE and working: authenticated REST call to the allowed root (folder id 392761581105) returned 200 with a real case folder (CCPY26050). Consistent with memory note 'Box went LIVE 2026-06-28'. CLAUDE.md claim that all BOX_* gates are/​remain false is STALE (see gates).

gates.sourceCommand: az functionapp config appsettings list -g rg-collisionspike-dev -n <app> --query "[?contains(name,'BOX_')||contains(name,'EVA_')||contains(name,'ENRICHMENT')||contains(name,'VALUATION')||name=='GRAPH_INTAKE_MAILBOXES']"
gates.docDrift: BOX_API_ENABLED, BOX_FOLDER_AT_INTAKE_ENABLED, BOX_FILEREQUEST_ENABLED are all 'true' on BOTH api and orch — Box is ACTIVATED, not off. ENRICHMENT_ENABLED and PDF_MAPPER_ENABLED are 'true' on both. EVA_API_ENABLED, VALUATION_ENABLED, BOX_EMBED_ENABLED, BOX_METADATA_ENABLED are not set (effectively off/reserved). GRAPH_INTAKE_MAILBOXES = engineers@ + digital@ (minIntakeDate 2026-06-27). NOTE: PDF_MAPPER_ENABLED=true was unrecorded before the 2026-06-29 re-verification; CLAUDE.md's gate list describes default-off SEMANTICS, not current live values.

csvComparison.sourceCommand: cut -d',' -f1 on both CSVs vs mcp__azure__group_resource_list output
csvComparison.recommendation: Both root CSVs are STALE/superseded — they predate the API/orchestration/SPA/Postgres/Box/Foundry deployment and omit all of those core live resources. Safe to delete; the live registry (docs/architecture/live-environment.md) + mcp__azure__group_resource_list are authoritative.
